body_html:
feb

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Please advise how you would like for me to respond.
Thanks.

Darren

Subject: Meeting between Mr. Epstein and the
Rwandan
students
Date: Tue, 17 Jan 2006 14:00:04 -0500
From: "Tascha Alvarez von Gustedt"
talvarez@clintonfoundation.org
To: dkiesq@aol.com

Dear Mr. Indyke,

Please allow me to introduce myself: my name is
Tascha Alvarez, and I am
the Assistant Director of Foreign Policy at the
Clinton Foundation. I
work with Eric Nonacs, and we were hoping that we
would be able to set
up a meeting between Mr. Epstein and the two Rwandan
students he is
supporting at City College. They are so grateful to
Mr. Epstein, and
would very much like to meet him and thank him in
person for his
support.

I would appreciate it if you could give me a phone
number that I could
reach you at, so that we could talk and see whether
this meeting could
be arranged.

Thank you in advance.

Best wishes for a wonderful 2006,

Tascha

Tascha Alvarez von Gustedt
Assistant Director, Foreign Policy
Office of President William J. Clinton
Tel. 212-348-5684
Fax. 212-348-9245
www.clintonfoundation.org
http://www.clintonfoundation.org/
